title: Loops Inside Loops
goal: Put a Repeat block inside another Repeat block. That's a lot of times.

steps.prompt: Drag a Repeat block into the workspace. Set it to 3.
Drag a second Repeat block inside the first one. Set the inside one to 4.
Put a Do block inside the inside Repeat.
Press play — how many times does the Do happen?

canned_hints: The outer Repeat runs the inner Repeat every single time.
3 times 4 is 12 — that's how many times the Do happens.

success_check.message_missing: You need Repeat blocks with a Do block inside.
